statement: In every magma, Equation 982 (`x = y * ((z * z) * (y * y))`) implies Equation 545 (`x = y * (z * (x * (z * x)))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0203
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op y (op (op z z) (op y y)))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op y (op z (op x (op z x))))
